title: physostegia virginiana f. alba
intro: Physostegia virginiana f. alba, also known as White Obedient Plant, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and its unique ability to move its flowers to face the direction of the sun. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as sore throats, coughs, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Physostegia virginiana f. alba include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
